entries.parsedImagePrompt: High-angle extreme long shot, static frame, capturing a sweeping view of a rain-soaked city street. No people visible in frame. A coffee shop awning protrudes from the left edge, rainwater streaming off its leading edge and splashing onto the dark wet asphalt. Puddles accumulate on the road and sidewalk, rippling with continuous raindrops. Distant buildings and sparse traffic are softened into blurred grey silhouettes by the heavy downpour. Soft overhead ambient lighting from a uniformly overcast sky, cool desaturated color tone with low contrast, maintaining a cold wet rain atmosphere. Deep depth of field renders the entire street and rain curtain in sharp detail. Artwork in cgstyle_9b with ultimate CG texture, Iray rendering, realistic physical light and shadow, transparent and deep wet-surface imagery.
entries.parsedVideoPrompt: [Scene] Wide city street under steady heavy rain. Water streams off a coffee shop awning, drumming steadily on the asphalt. Puddles accumulate on the road, their surfaces constantly disturbed by raindrops. Distant traffic sounds are muffled by the downpour, while the wind occasionally shifts the curtain of rain. Overcast sky provides a uniform grey light. [Characters] No characters present in the shot. Shot 1 (High-Angle Extreme Long Shot, 2s): Static camera Action: Heavy rain pours down over the wide street, blurring the distant buildings and sparse traffic into grey silhouettes. The coffee shop awning on the left sheds a steady stream of water from its edge, the splashing water cascading onto the wet asphalt below. Shot 2 (High-Angle Extreme Long Shot, 2s): Static camera Action: Puddles continue to ripple as fresh raindrops strike their surfaces. The wind briefly catches the edge of the awning, causing it to flutter as water continues streaming down.
